task1.title: The amount of tea and coffee imported by four different countries
task1.instruction: The graph below shows the amount of tea and coffee imported by four different countries. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Nowadays, children spend a lot of time watching TV and playing computer games. Some people believe this has negative effects on children’s mental abilities. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
